title: Item Highlighter Simple Icons
description: Replaces stars from item highlighter mod to 2x2 squares
body:
# What does it change?
This resoursepack replaces stars from item highlighter mod to 2x2 small squares.
# Any requirements?
Only the [item highlighter mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-highlighter/versions) on any version.
# How does it look like?
![example 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Zdgi0CUM/images/69af0481e62267c27a09df6b37fc88ac888b98e1.png)
![how does it look like](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Zdgi0CUM/images/c71832f99efeae6734962035376be9a49909bc5b.gif)
